title: 9分达人听力6 Test 3 Listening
source: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

groups.title: Washing Machine Warranty
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Personal details • Name: Judie Smith • Reference number: $1$ • Time of purchase: $2$ ago • Current address: 120 $3$, Oxford • Postcode: $4$ Problems • The floor was wet because of the $5$. • The washing machine was out of control and the woman $6$ immediately. • The floor is made of $7$. Arrangement for the repair work • Ask a $8$ to repair the washing machine. • The repairman is available $9$. • The woman's house is opposite the $10$.

questions.title: Reference number: 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Reference number；提示词 Reference number，此处应填字母和数字的组合。
题目解析：第 1-4 题考查个人信息填空。本题中的定位词 Reference number（参考编号）不容易发生替换，只需要跟上音频记录下字母和数字的组合即可。因此答案为 CWX576884。注意 double eight 会出现连读。

questions.title: Time of purchase: 【   】 ago
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 purchase；提示词 Time，此处应填时间类名词。
题目解析：定位词 purchase 在录音中被替换为 buy，提示词 Time 以 when 体现，注意听之后出现的时间。首先出现了 last summer，但与题干的 ago 无法搭配使用，可排除。随后出现了答案信息：“… it was about 9 months ago.”需要注意的是，答案信息出现后又出现了一个干扰时间 2-year，不但词性不合适，且不符合题干限定 purchase，因为它是 warranty period（保修期限）。因此答案为 9 months 或 nine months。

questions.title: Current address: 120 【   】, Oxford
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 address；提示词 address，此处应填地址，格式为“路名＋路”。
题目解析：题干的条件限定为 Current，意味着录音中很可能会出现 old/previous address 作为干扰信息。另外，表示路的词汇一般为 road、street、avenue、lane、drive 这几个词，而表示路名的单词，录音中通常不会给出拼写，但有规律可循，大部分路名是景观类词汇，如 forest、mountain、lake 等，也可能是方位类词汇，如 north、south 等，本题答案恰好属于后者。因此答案为 Middle Street。

questions.title: Postcode: 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Postcode；提示词 Postcode，此处应填字母和数字的组合。
题目解析：定位词 Postcode 无法替换，跟上录音即可，但需要注意的是，本题紧跟上一题，答案出现较快，在听到含有 postcode 的问句时，就要集中注意力迅速写下答案。若前一题的地址还没写完，建议平时多练习使用简写，如用 St. 表示 street。因此答案为 GO19 4KE。

questions.title: The floor was wet because of the 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 floor、wet；提示词 the，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 floor 出现在答案后，wet 在录音中被替换为 soaked，所以在做该题时需要有意识地先抓取符合答案的名词，结合场景以及前一句所提到的洗衣机漏水（it was leaking）也可以找到答案词。因此答案为 water。

questions.title: The washing machine was out of control and the woman 【   】 immediately.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 out of control；提示词 and、immediately，此处应填动词过去式。
题目解析：定位词 out of control 在录音中原词重现，但需要注意空白处应填写的动作是 the woman 发出的。out of control 之后出现的动作有 started to sound、pressing any button、switched off、stopped leaking，只有 pressing any button 和 switched off 是这位女士发出的动作，且 pressing any button 以否定形式出现。另外，题干中的 immediately 在录音中被替换为 straight away。因此答案为 switched off。

questions.title: The floor is made of 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 floor；提示词 is made of，此处应填表示材质的名词。
题目解析：本题难度不大，定位词和提示词均在录音中原词重现，注意通过否定信号词 rather than 来排除干扰信息 marble。因此答案为 wood。

questions.title: Ask a 【   】 to repair the washing machine.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 Ask、a，此处应填表示人的名词。
题目解析：考虑到 Ask 和 repair 的同义替换较多，所以本题没有很好的定位词。在预判出空白处要填表示人的名词之后，有意识地去抓取符合预判的词汇即可。录音中没有干扰信息，并将题干中的 repair 替换成了 fix（这是一对高频替换词）。因此答案为 client engineer。

questions.title: The repairman is available 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 repairman；提示词 available，此处应填时间类名词。
题目解析：本题难度不大，在女士问“How about this Saturday?”时，需要注意听工作人员的回答。工作人员回答周六的时间已经约满了，所以排除 this Saturday 这个干扰信息。接着提出最早的时间是 next Tuesday，提示词 available 在录音中被替换为 we can arrange for you。因此答案为 next Tuesday。注意不能漏掉 next。

questions.title: The woman's house is opposite the 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 house；提示词 opposite、the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：定位词 house 出现后，答案信息随即出现：“It's near the Central Market, just across from the Post Office.”注意排除干扰信息 Central Market，其前的介词为 near，不符合题干限定 opposite，而 opposite 在录音中被替换为 just across from（就在……对面）。因此答案为 Post Office。

transcript.en: Roger: Good morning.
transcript.cn: 早上好。

transcript.en: Roger: This is the Customer Service Department of Kingswell Washing Machine.
transcript.cn: 这里是金斯威尔洗衣机公司的客户服务部。

transcript.en: Roger: Roger speaking, how may I help you?
transcript.cn: 我是罗杰，请问有什么可以帮您？

transcript.en: Woman: Good morning.
transcript.cn: 早上好。

transcript.en: Woman: I'm calling about the washing machine I bought from the mall several months ago.
transcript.cn: 我想咨询一下几个月前我在商场买的一台洗衣机。

transcript.en: Woman: There's something wrong with it at the moment, so what do I have to do?
transcript.cn: 它现在出了点问题，所以我该怎么办呢？

transcript.en: Roger: OK, first I need to get a few details about this.
transcript.cn: 好的，首先我需要了解几个相关信息。

transcript.en: Roger: Could you give me your name, please?
transcript.cn: 请问您怎么称呼？

transcript.en: Woman: Yes, it's Judie Smith.
transcript.cn: 好的，我叫朱迪·史密斯。

transcript.en: Roger: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Roger: I need one more thing.
transcript.cn: 我还需要一样东西。

transcript.en: Roger: There's a reference number.
transcript.cn: 有一个参考编号。

transcript.en: Roger: It should be in the top right-hand corner of the warranty card we gave you.
transcript.cn: 它应该在我们给您的保修卡右上角。

transcript.en: Woman: Let me have a look … Oh, here it is.
transcript.cn: 我找找看……哦，在这儿呢。

transcript.en: Woman: It's CWX576884.
Roger: Thanks.
transcript.cn: 谢谢。

transcript.en: Roger: Well, I need to make sure if your washing machine is still within the warranty period, so when did you buy it?
transcript.cn: 那我需要确认一下您的洗衣机是否还在保修期内，请问您是什么时候买的？

transcript.en: Woman: Oh, sure.
transcript.cn: 哦，好的。

transcript.en: Woman: I remember I bought it last summer, so … it was about 9 months ago.
transcript.cn: 我记得是去年夏天买的，所以……大概是九个月前吧。

transcript.en: Woman: And the card here says this washing machine has a 2-year warranty, so it's definitely within the period.
transcript.cn: 而且这卡上写着这台洗衣机有两年保修，所以肯定还在保修期内。

transcript.en: Roger: Of course it is, Madam.
transcript.cn: 那当然，女士。

transcript.en: Roger: All right, then I need your address?
transcript.cn: 好的，那我需要您的地址。

transcript.en: Woman: My old address or my current one?
transcript.cn: 是我的旧地址还是现在的地址？

transcript.en: Roger: Your current one, as we will send in someone to fix the washing machine for you.
transcript.cn: 您现在的地址，因为我们要派人上门帮您修洗衣机。

transcript.en: Woman: It's 120 Middle Street, Oxford.
transcript.cn: 是牛津市米德尔街120号。

transcript.en: Roger: And the postcode?
transcript.cn: 那邮编呢？

transcript.en: Woman: It's GO19 4KE.
transcript.cn: 是 GO19 4KE。

transcript.en: Roger: Now I need to know the exact problem of the washing machine.
transcript.cn: 现在我需要了解一下洗衣机具体是什么问题。

transcript.en: Roger: Could you describe it in detail?
transcript.cn: 您能详细描述一下吗？

transcript.en: Woman: Actually the washing machine did work very well until last weekend.
transcript.cn: 其实这台洗衣机一直用得挺好，直到上个周末才出问题。

transcript.en: Woman: I put some clothes into it, and it worked normally at first, then I just got down to doing some gardening.
transcript.cn: 我放了些衣服进去，一开始运转正常，然后我就去弄花园了。

transcript.en: Woman: But after about 30 minutes when I came back to the house, I found it was leaking!
transcript.cn: 但大概过了三十分钟，我回到屋里，发现它在漏水！

transcript.en: Woman: The water had soaked the entire floor.
transcript.cn: 水把整个地板都浸湿了。

transcript.en: Roger: I'm sorry to hear that, Madam.
transcript.cn: 很抱歉听到这个情况，女士。

transcript.en: Roger: So did you do anything to make the leaking stop?
transcript.cn: 那您有没有采取什么措施让它停止漏水？

transcript.en: Woman: At that moment, the washing machine was totally out of control, and the alarm on it also started to sound.
transcript.cn: 当时那台洗衣机完全失控了，上面的警报也响了起来。

transcript.en: Woman: I thought there was not much point in pressing any button on the machine, so I just switched off the machine straight away.
transcript.cn: 我觉得按机器上任何按钮都没什么用，所以我就直接把机器关掉了。

transcript.en: Woman: Then it stopped leaking at once, thank goodness!
transcript.cn: 然后它立刻就不漏了，谢天谢地！

transcript.en: Roger: Well, I think that was the only thing you could do.
transcript.cn: 嗯，我觉得那是您当时唯一能做的事了。

transcript.en: Woman: Oh then, I found my floor was nearly a disaster.
transcript.cn: 对了，后来我发现地板简直成了灾难。

transcript.en: Woman: As it is made of wood rather than marble, it could not be soaked in water for a long time, so what I did in the next 2 hours was wiping up the water on the floor!
transcript.cn: 因为地板是木头做的，不是大理石的，泡在水里太久可不行，所以接下来两个小时我都在擦地板上的水！

transcript.en: Roger: Right.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Woman: Later I tried the washing machine once more, but the problem still existed.
transcript.cn: 后来我又试了一次洗衣机，但问题还是没解决。

transcript.en: Roger: Well, I've taken down all the related information.
transcript.cn: 好的，相关信息我都记下来了。

transcript.en: Roger: Later we'll send a client engineer to your house to fix it.
transcript.cn: 稍后我们会派一位客户工程师上门帮您修。

transcript.en: Woman: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Woman: Could you arrange the repair work as soon as possible, as I'm too busy at work to do the laundry by hand?
transcript.cn: 您能尽快安排维修吗？我工作太忙了，实在没法用手洗衣服。

transcript.en: Woman: How about this Saturday?
transcript.cn: 这周六怎么样？

transcript.en: Roger: Umm … I have to check the schedule of the repairman … Oh sorry, Madam, Saturday has been occupied.
transcript.cn: 嗯……我得查一下维修师傅的排期……哦抱歉，女士，周六已经排满了。

transcript.en: Roger: The earliest day we can arrange for you is next Tuesday.
transcript.cn: 我们最早能给您安排的是下周二。

transcript.en: Roger: Is that OK with you?
transcript.cn: 您看这样行吗？

transcript.en: Woman: Fine, I can take a leave from work that day.
transcript.cn: 行，那天我可以请个假。

transcript.en: Woman: Anyway, thanks.
transcript.cn: 不管怎样，谢谢你。

transcript.en: Woman: Oh, my house is easy to find.
transcript.cn: 哦对了，我家很好找。

transcript.en: Woman: It's near the Central Market, just across from the Post Office.
transcript.cn: 就在中央市场附近，正好在邮局对面。

transcript.en: Roger: All right.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Roger: And the last thing, could you tell me your phone number, please?
transcript.cn: 最后一件事，能麻烦您告诉我您的电话号码吗？

transcript.en: Woman: Sure.
transcript.cn: 当然。

transcript.en: Woman: It's 3864 7757.
Roger: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Roger: I've got it.
transcript.cn: 我记下来了。

transcript.en: Roger: The repairman will contact you before he comes.
transcript.cn: 维修师傅上门前会先联系您。

transcript.en: Woman: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Woman: Thank you very much.
transcript.cn: 非常感谢。

transcript.en: Roger: You're welcome.
transcript.cn: 不客气。

transcript.en: Roger: Bye!
transcript.cn: 再见！

transcript.en: Woman: Bye!
transcript.cn: 再见！

groups.title: Annual Running Competition
groups.desc:
Questions 11-17
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect:
Starting point: at the $11$ this year
Distance: $12$
Prize: $13$ for the winner
Finishing point: at the $14$
Registration site: at the $15$
Age limit: people who are under $16$ are not allowed
Need to bring: a $17$ and spare shoes

questions.title: Starting point: at the 【   】 this year
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Starting point、this year；提示词 at the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：定位词 Starting point 在录音中以 start 出现，注意排除干扰信息。首先听到地点类名词 park，但录音中提到的是 used to（以前），不符合题干限定 this year。接着 this time 出现，符合 this year 限定，注意抓取随后出现的地点类名词。因此答案为 castle。

questions.title: Distance: 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Distance；提示词 Distance，此处应填数字和长度单位的组合。
题目解析：本题定位不难，但需要排除干扰信息。定位词 Distance 原词重现，随后听到 five miles，不过它对应的时间是 the past few years，转折信号词 but 之后出现的 seven miles 对应的才是这次举办的时间。因此答案为 7 miles 或 seven miles。注意填写答案时不要漏掉长度单位。

questions.title: Prize: 【   】 for the winner
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Prize、winner；提示词 for，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 Prize 原词重现，the champion 替换了题干中的 the winner，接着出现了答案信息："The runner with the shortest time will be awarded ..." 其中 The runner with the shortest time 对应 the winner，be awarded（被授予）对应 Prize。因此答案为 sports equipment。

questions.title: Finishing point: at the 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Finishing point；提示词 at the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：定位词 Finishing point 在录音中以 cross the finish line 出现，答案信息紧跟其后出现，无干扰信息，抓取地点类名词即可。因此答案为 station。

questions.title: Registration site: at the 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Registration；提示词 site、at the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：定位词 Registration 在录音中先以 register 出现，后又被替换为 enrol 再次出现，注意通过否定信号词 can't 排除干扰信息 the Internet，随后转折信号词 but 之后出现的地点才是正确答案。因此答案为 town hall。

questions.title: Age limit: people who are under 【   】 are not allowed
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Age limit；提示词 under，此处应填与年龄有关的数字。
题目解析：本题的题干限定为 under ... are not allowed，说明考查的是参加比赛人员的年龄下限。定位词 Age limit 出现后，答案信息跟着出现，其中 at least 替换了提示词 under，通过 top limit（上限）可排除之后出现的数字。因此答案为 16 或 sixteen。

questions.title: Need to bring: a 【   】 and spare shoes
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 spare shoes；提示词 a、and，此处应填单数名词，且与 spare shoes 并列。
题目解析：定位词 spare shoes 先于答案出现，在录音中被替换为 extra pair of shoes。并列信号词 Besides 出现，意味着答案即将出现，注意抓取符合预判的单数名词，其中 advisable 替换了题干中的 Need to。因此答案为 jacket。

groups.question_title: Which THREE of the following are given as the training advice by the speaker?

list.title: G
list.content: run on various types of roads and paths

questions.analysis:
Questions 18-20 答案 B & F & G (IN ANY ORDER)
听前预测：定位词 training advice。
题目解析：本部分的核心考点依然是对干扰信息的否定识别。选项 D 的信息最早出现，不过这不属于说话者的建议，而是培训师课上会讲的内容，可排除。接着听到题干中 advice 的同义替换 suggestions 出现，比较容易听出，注意认真听取之后的内容。首先，表示序列关系的信号词 First 引导第一条建议出现，先是听到了选项 A 中的 dogs，但伴随否定形式 don't 出现，可排除，然后听到选项 E 中的 groups，但紧接着出现了转折信号词 but，意味着选项 E 被否定，同时肯定了 but 之后出现的内容，即 run with your friend，对应选项 B 的 compete with a friend。其次，表示序列关系的信号词 Then 提示第二条建议即将出现，其中 suggest 对应 advice，make a record of your running time 对应选项 F 中的 time yourself。接着，并列信号词 What's more 引出第三条建议，其中 had better 表示一种肯定建议，different roads and paths 替换了选项 G 中的 various types of roads and paths。最后，听到了选项 C 中的 all weather，不过也是通过 don't 予以了否定。因此答案为 B & F & G。

Questions 18-20 答案 B & F & G (IN ANY ORDER)
听前预测：定位词 training advice。
题目解析：本部分的核心考点依然是对干扰信息的否定识别。选项 D 的信息最早出现，不过这不属于说话者的建议，而是培训师课上会讲的内容，可排除。接着听到题干中 advice 的同义替换 suggestions 出现，比较容易听出，注意认真听取之后的内容。首先，表示序列关系的信号词 First 引导第一条建议出现，先是听到了选项 A 中的 dogs，但伴随否定形式 don't 出现，可排除，然后听到选项 E 中的 groups，但紧接着出现了转折信号词 but，意味着选项 E 被否定，同时肯定了 but 之后出现的内容，即 run with your friend，对应选项 B 的 compete with a friend。其次，表示序列关系的信号词 Then 提示第二条建议即将出现，其中 suggest 对应 advice，make a record of your running time 对应选项 F 中的 time yourself。接着，并列信号词 What's more 引出第三条建议，其中 had better 表示一种肯定建议，different roads and paths 替换了选项 G 中的 various types of roads and paths。最后，听到了选项 C 中的 all weather，不过也是通过 don't 予以了否定。因此答案为 B & F & G。

Questions 18-20 答案 B & F & G (IN ANY ORDER)
听前预测：定位词 training advice。
题目解析：本部分的核心考点依然是对干扰信息的否定识别。选项 D 的信息最早出现，不过这不属于说话者的建议，而是培训师课上会讲的内容，可排除。接着听到题干中 advice 的同义替换 suggestions 出现，比较容易听出，注意认真听取之后的内容。首先，表示序列关系的信号词 First 引导第一条建议出现，先是听到了选项 A 中的 dogs，但伴随否定形式 don't 出现，可排除，然后听到选项 E 中的 groups，但紧接着出现了转折信号词 but，意味着选项 E 被否定，同时肯定了 but 之后出现的内容，即 run with your friend，对应选项 B 的 compete with a friend。其次，表示序列关系的信号词 Then 提示第二条建议即将出现，其中 suggest 对应 advice，make a record of your running time 对应选项 F 中的 time yourself。接着，并列信号词 What's more 引出第三条建议，其中 had better 表示一种肯定建议，different roads and paths 替换了选项 G 中的 various types of roads and paths。最后，听到了选项 C 中的 all weather，不过也是通过 don't 予以了否定。因此答案为 B & F & G。

transcript.en: Good morning everyone, I'm Dave, the manager of Creton running sports club.
transcript.cn: 大家早上好，我是戴夫，克雷顿跑步运动俱乐部的经理。

transcript.en: Today I'll tell you something about the running competition which will be held next month.
transcript.cn: 今天我要给大家讲讲下个月要举办的跑步比赛。

transcript.en: As we know, the annual run is one of the most popular events in our town, and it attracts young and old every year.
transcript.cn: 众所周知，这场年度跑步赛是我们镇上最受欢迎的活动之一，每年都吸引着男女老少参加。

transcript.en: This year we will continue the tradition, but there're some small adjustments.
transcript.cn: 今年我们会延续这个传统，不过有一些小的调整。

transcript.en: First about the date, the exact time of the run is still on the first Saturday of May, but we'll inform you in advance if it's to be delayed due to bad weather.
transcript.cn: 首先说日期，比赛的具体时间仍然定在五月的第一个周六，但如果因天气恶劣需要延期，我们会提前通知大家。

transcript.en: The run used to start at the park, which is being refurbished at the moment, so this time all the runners are expected to gather in front of the castle and start from there.
transcript.cn: 以前比赛是从公园出发的，但公园目前正在翻修，所以这次所有跑者都要在城堡前集合，从那里出发。

transcript.en: The actual run begins at 9 am, but the runners start arriving at about 8.45, so some of you might have to get up early that morning if you live far away.
transcript.cn: 比赛正式开始时间是上午九点，但跑者们大约八点四十五就要陆续到场了，所以住得远的人那天早上可能得早点起床。

transcript.en: Someone has asked how long you'll be required to run.
transcript.cn: 有人问需要跑多远。

transcript.en: In the past few years, the runners have had to complete the distance of five miles, but most people want to do a bit more than that, so we will lengthen it to seven miles this time.
transcript.cn: 过去几年，跑者们要跑完五英里的路程，但大多数人想再多跑一点，所以这次我们把距离加长到七英里。

transcript.en: Some of you might not be sure whether you can run that far, so you'd better start doing a bit of training.
transcript.cn: 有些人可能不太确定自己能不能跑那么远，所以你们最好开始做点训练。

transcript.en: I'm excited to tell you that this year we've got the sponsorship from a big company, who has promised to cover all the competition expenses, including the prize for the champion.
transcript.cn: 我很高兴地告诉大家，今年我们拿到了一家大公司的赞助，他们承诺承担比赛的全部费用，包括给冠军的奖品。

transcript.en: The runner with the shortest time will be awarded sports equipment worth about one thousand pounds.
transcript.cn: 用时最短的跑者将获得价值约一千英镑的运动器材。

transcript.en: Each runner will be timed from the starting point till the end.
transcript.cn: 每位跑者都会从起点到终点全程计时。

transcript.en: When you cross the finish line marked on the ground of the station, you'll be given a bar code, and you should take this to one of the run volunteers who will scan it.
transcript.cn: 当你冲过标在车站地面上的终点线时，会拿到一个条形码，你要把它交给一位赛事志愿者，他们会帮你扫描。

transcript.en: Then you can get your time on the computer immediately.
transcript.cn: 然后你马上就能在电脑上看到自己的成绩。

transcript.en: And the volunteers will collect all the results.
transcript.cn: 志愿者会汇总所有的成绩。

transcript.en: If you are interested in the run, I suggest you register as soon as possible.
transcript.cn: 如果你对这次跑步赛感兴趣，我建议你尽快报名。

transcript.en: The deadline is next Sunday.
transcript.cn: 截止日期是下周日。

transcript.en: However, I should tell you this year you can't enrol through the Internet but have to go to the town hall and give all the personal information and sign your name.
transcript.cn: 不过我得提醒大家，今年不能通过网上报名，而是要亲自去市政厅，提供所有个人信息并签上你的名字。

transcript.en: It doesn't cost anything to register, as I've just said, all the costs related to the competition will be paid by our sponsor.
transcript.cn: 报名是免费的，就像我刚说的，比赛相关的所有费用都由我们的赞助商承担。

transcript.en: As for the age limit, you have to be at least sixteen, and the top limit is now seventy, though you need to obtain a health certificate from your doctor if you're over sixty years old.
transcript.cn: 至于年龄限制，你至少要满十六岁，年龄上限现在是七十岁，不过如果你超过六十岁，需要从医生那里开一张健康证明。

transcript.en: If you do come and participate in the run, I definitely recommend that you should prepare an extra pair of shoes, as last year one of the runners got something wrong with his shoes during the running and had to give up halfway through the competition.
transcript.cn: 如果你确实要来参加比赛，我强烈建议你准备一双备用鞋，因为去年有位跑者跑到一半鞋出了问题，结果不得不中途退赛。

transcript.en: Besides, a jacket will also be advisable, so you don't catch a cold after sweating a lot during the running.
transcript.cn: 另外，最好也带一件外套，这样跑步大量出汗后就不会着凉了。

transcript.en: There is no need to worry about snacks or drinks, as every runner will be supplied with chocolates and bottled water.
transcript.cn: 至于零食和饮料不用担心，我们会给每位跑者提供巧克力和瓶装水。

transcript.en: To prepare for this annual running competition, our club is going to organise a training class for all the participants.
transcript.cn: 为了备战这场年度跑步比赛，我们俱乐部准备为所有参赛者组织一个训练班。

transcript.en: In the class an experienced trainer will teach you the professional steps on how to do a running competition, like warming up before running.
transcript.cn: 在训练班上，一位经验丰富的教练会教你参加跑步比赛的专业步骤，比如跑前热身。

transcript.en: For those who plan to do training by yourselves, there're some suggestions for you.
transcript.cn: 对于打算自己训练的人，我这里也有一些建议。

transcript.en: First, don't just do morning jogging with your dog.
transcript.cn: 第一，别只是牵着狗晨跑。

transcript.en: Remember that you're going to compete with others.
transcript.cn: 记住，你是要跟别人比赛的。

transcript.en: I know some people like to exercise in groups, but it's more effective to run with your friend who can be your rival and stimulate your potential.
transcript.cn: 我知道有些人喜欢集体锻炼，但和一个能当你对手、激发你潜力的朋友一起跑，效果会更好。

transcript.en: Then I suggest you make a record of your running time.
transcript.cn: 其次，我建议你记录下自己的跑步时间。

transcript.en: It can show whether you've made any progress day by day.
transcript.cn: 这样能看出你每天有没有进步。

transcript.en: What's more, you'd better get used to different roads and paths in the countryside or village, as you won't just be running on level ground during the competition.
transcript.cn: 还有，你最好去适应乡下或村里各种不同的路面和小径，因为比赛时你可不会只在平地上跑。

transcript.en: By the way, you don't have to run in all kinds of weather, as I've just said our competition is going to be held in good weather.
transcript.cn: 顺便说一句，你不必在各种天气下都去跑，因为我刚说过，我们的比赛会选在天气好的时候举行。

transcript.en: Well, that's all the details about the running competition.
transcript.cn: 好了，这就是关于这次跑步比赛的全部内容。

transcript.en: If you have any other questions, please call our club at 8345 6234.
transcript.cn: 如果你还有其他问题，请拨打我们俱乐部的电话 8345 6234。

transcript.en: Anyone who is interested in the run, just get started.
transcript.cn: 对这次跑步赛感兴趣的人，赶紧行动起来吧。

groups.title: Parts of the hotel
groups.question_title: What problem does Mona point out about each part of the hotel where she interned?
groups.desc:
Questions 21-26
What problem does Mona point out about each part of the hotel where she interned?
Write the correct letter, A-F, next to Questions 21-26.

questions.title: reception
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 reception。
题目解析：配对题的核心考点在于对同义替换的识别，包括题干和选项在录音中发生的同义替换。本部分 6 道题的题干均为酒店的一部分，其名称不易发生替换，精确定位后重点听选项的同义替换即可。本题定位词 reception 原词重现后，紧跟答案信息：“I noticed the staff there kept doing the same thing every day, like answering the phone, helping guests with check-in and check-out, etc. There was nothing special for them.”其中 doing the same thing every day 以及 nothing special 为选项 C 中 daily routine 的具体展开替换，routine 意为“常规，惯例”。因此答案为 C。

questions.title: restaurant
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 restaurant。
题目解析：本题难度不大，定位词 restaurant 出现后，答案信息随即出现：“... the employees told me that they must obey the rules exactly.”其中 must obey the rules exactly 替换了选项 B 中的 very strict。之后 Mona 还通过举例进行了具体说明。因此答案为 B。

questions.title: coffee bar
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 coffee bar。
题目解析：听到定位词 coffee bar 之后可锁定答案句：“... as a shortage of hands always made many customers wait long for ordering, eating or paying the bills.”只需听出 a shortage of hands 与选项 D 中的 lacks sufficient staff 为同义替换即可。还可通过之后听到的“Their own staff could not control customer flow.”来判断，这也是在表达人手不够。因此答案为 D。

questions.title: shop
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 shop。
题目解析：本题定位词 shop 距离答案信息较远，中间描述了工作的时间和内容，不过转折信号词 but 的出现预示着答案即将出现：“... but later I found this work was a bit tough. Every night when I got off work, I was nearly exhausted.”其中 tough 和 exhausted 替换了选项 F 中的 very tiring。因此答案为 F。

questions.title: personnel office
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 personnel office。
题目解析：同上一题，定位词 personnel office 出现后没有马上出现答案句，依然是通过转折信号词 But 来锁定答案句：“But the employee of the personnel office seemed a bit annoyed and started complaining ...”其中 a bit annoyed 和 started complaining 替换了选项 A 中的 lacks patience。因此答案为 A。

questions.title: cleaning
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 cleaning。
题目解析：本题不难，定位词 cleaning 和答案信息出现在同一句中：“... which were probably bought such a long time ago that the sound seemed too loud when they were working.”其中 the sound seemed too loud 替换了选项 E 中的 noisy。因此答案为 E。

groups.desc:
Questions 27-30
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: How does the experience benefit Mona?

options.title: A
options.content: It is good for her future job.

options.title: B
options.content: It is good for her dissertation.

options.title: C
options.content: It can let her know something about the specific job.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 benefit；提示词 Mona。
题目解析：本题可通过 Tom 的话来定位，提示词暗示答案会出现在 Mona 的回答中。首先出现了选项 B 中 dissertation 的对应信息 essay，不过随后出现了 But，可排除选项 B，重点听 But 之后的内容：“But in the end, I found it has given me some practical examples which are helpful to what I intend to do after graduation ...”其中 helpful 替换了选项 A 中的 good，what I intend to do after graduation 替换了 her future job。选项 C 中的 know something about the specific job 在录音中被替换为 got a clear idea of some specific work positions，同样作为干扰信息出现，通过其前的否定信号词 haven’t 可排除。因此答案为 A。

questions.title: Why does the tutor want Mona to do the presentation?

options.title: A
options.content: Because she can do it skilfully.

options.title: B
options.content: Because she wants to do it herself.

options.title: C
options.content: Because she can show other students how to do a presentation.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 tutor、presentation；提示词 tutor。
题目解析：提示词暗示答案应为 tutor 的意见。定位词 presentation 先出现，接着听到了选项 A 中 skilfully 的否定信息 not so good at，故排除。答案信息依然由 But 引出，同时 tutor 一并出现：“But the tutor says ... and other students can learn from my presentation.”其中 other students can learn from my presentation 对应选项 C 中的 show other students how to do a presentation。选项 B 在录音中未提及。因此答案为 C。

questions.title: What does Mona suggest Tom do?

options.title: A
options.content: talk to the university's career centre

questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 Mona。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词，注意通过对话的推进定位。提示词暗示答案由 Mona 提供。首先听到了选项 C 中的 manager，随即听到 Mona 给出了否定回答，故排除选项 C。接着答案句出现：“There is a career office on campus that has got a list of companies offering internship opportunities to students. The office will help you contact where you want to go.”其中 career office on campus 替换了选项 A 中的 university’s career centre。而选项 B 同样是作为干扰信息，于正确答案后出现，但存在语义偏差，录音中是说需要 tutor 提供一封推荐信，并非选项 B 所说的“去和 tutor 谈论此事”。因此答案为 A。

questions.title: What is Tom's plan for his own essay?

options.title: A
options.content: to study about the rise of five-star hotels

options.title: C
options.content: to do research into how the hotel industry works

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 plan、essay；提示词 Tom。
题目解析：提示词暗示答案会出现在 Tom 的回答中。定位词 plan 和 essay 同时出现在 Mona 的提问中，注意听 Tom 的回答。首先听到了“... the hotel industry is developing at high speed.”，注意它与选项 C 中的 how the hotel industry works 存在语义偏差。之后听到：“What I’m struck by is ... the ever-increasing number of five-star hotels, so I intend to carry out extensive research on this aspect.”其中 the ever-increasing number of five-star hotels 替换了选项 A 中的 the rise of five-star hotels，intend to 替换了题干中的 plan。最后提到了干扰选项 B，但可通过转折信号词 but 和否定信号词 haven’t decided 排除。因此答案为 A。

transcript.en: Mona: Hello Tom, sorry I'm late.
transcript.cn: 你好汤姆，抱歉我来晚了。

transcript.en: Tom: Hi Mona, no problem.
transcript.cn: 嗨莫娜，没关系。

transcript.en: Tom: I heard you've finished the essay for the management course.
transcript.cn: 我听说你管理课的论文已经写完了。

transcript.en: Tom: Which company did you focus on?
transcript.cn: 你研究的是哪家公司？

transcript.en: Mona: It was finished last week.
transcript.cn: 上周就写完了。

transcript.en: Mona: I chose the hotel where I interned last summer and mainly concentrated on my work experience there.
transcript.cn: 我选的是去年夏天实习过的那家酒店，主要写了我在那儿的工作经历。

transcript.en: Tom: Could you give me some details?
transcript.cn: 能跟我讲讲细节吗？

transcript.en: Tom: I'm interested.
transcript.cn: 我挺感兴趣的。

transcript.en: Mona: Well, during my three-month internship, I observed every part of the hotel carefully each day and also talked with some of my colleagues.
transcript.cn: 嗯，在为期三个月的实习期间，我每天都仔细观察酒店的各个部门，还跟一些同事聊过。

transcript.en: Mona: I've found some problems in different parts of the hotel and made a conclusion in the essay.
transcript.cn: 我发现酒店不同部门都存在一些问题，并在论文里做了总结。

transcript.en: Mona: Let me start from the reception desk.
transcript.cn: 我先从前台说起吧。

transcript.en: Mona: I noticed the staff there kept doing the same thing every day, like answering the phone, helping guests with check-in and check-out, etc.
transcript.cn: 我注意到那里的员工每天都在重复做同样的事，比如接电话、帮客人办理入住和退房之类的。

transcript.en: Mona: There was nothing special for them.
transcript.cn: 对他们来说没什么新鲜的。

transcript.en: Tom: That must be very boring.
transcript.cn: 那一定很无聊。

transcript.en: Mona: Yeah I think so.
transcript.cn: 是啊，我也这么觉得。

transcript.en: Mona: And in the restaurant, the employees told me that they must obey the rules exactly.
transcript.cn: 还有餐厅，员工告诉我他们必须严格遵守规定。

transcript.en: Mona: For example, if they don't wear uniforms during working hours, 20% of their daily wages will be deducted.
transcript.cn: 比如，如果上班时间不穿制服，就会被扣掉当天工资的百分之二十。

transcript.en: Mona: And then about the coffee bar.
transcript.cn: 然后说说咖啡吧。

transcript.en: Mona: During peak hours, I was asked to help in the coffee bar several times, as a shortage of hands always made many customers wait long for ordering, eating or paying the bills.
transcript.cn: 高峰时段，我好几次被叫去咖啡吧帮忙，因为人手不足总是让很多顾客点单、就餐或结账时等很久。

transcript.en: Mona: Their own staff could not control customer flow.
transcript.cn: 他们自己的员工没法应付客流量。

transcript.en: Tom: Oh, that seems a little messy.
transcript.cn: 哦，那听起来有点乱。

transcript.en: Mona: Yes, definitely.
transcript.cn: 是的，确实如此。

transcript.en: Mona: And the place where I worked was a shop selling towels, and pyjamas as well as souvenirs.
transcript.cn: 还有我工作过的那家店，卖毛巾、睡衣还有纪念品。

transcript.en: Mona: Every day I had to be there from 9 am to 6 pm.
transcript.cn: 我每天都得从早上九点待到下午六点。

transcript.en: Mona: My duty was to set up the window display and serve the customers.
transcript.cn: 我的职责是布置橱窗陈列和接待顾客。

transcript.en: Mona: At first it seemed interesting, but later I found this work was a bit tough.
transcript.cn: 一开始还觉得挺有意思，但后来发现这活儿有点累人。

transcript.en: Mona: Every night when I got off work, I was nearly exhausted.
transcript.cn: 每天晚上下班时，我几乎都累垮了。

transcript.en: Mona: What I wanted was just a good rest and sleep.
transcript.cn: 我只想好好休息、睡一觉。

transcript.en: Tom: Doesn't sound like an easy job.
transcript.cn: 听起来可不是个轻松的活儿。

transcript.en: Mona: It definitely wasn't.
transcript.cn: 确实一点都不轻松。

transcript.en: Mona: Then there was the personnel office.
transcript.cn: 接下来是人事办公室。

transcript.en: Mona: I went there on the first day when I arrived at the hotel.
transcript.cn: 我到酒店的第一天就去了那里。

transcript.en: Mona: As I was not familiar with everything, I asked the staff several questions.
transcript.cn: 因为我对什么都不熟悉，就问了工作人员好几个问题。

transcript.en: Mona: But the employee of the personnel office seemed a bit annoyed and started complaining, which gave me a very bad impression.
transcript.cn: 但人事办公室的那位员工似乎有点不耐烦，还开始抱怨，给我留下了很不好的印象。

transcript.en: Mona: Lastly, as regards cleaning, it wasn't too bad compared with other parts of the hotel, except the vacuum cleaners, which were probably bought such a long time ago that the sound seemed too loud when they were working.
transcript.cn: 最后，说到保洁，跟酒店其他部门比起来还不算太糟，就是那些吸尘器，大概买了很久了，工作起来声音显得太吵了。

transcript.en: Mona: But fortunately, the hotel hasn't received any complaint from the customers so far.
transcript.cn: 不过幸运的是，到目前为止酒店还没收到过顾客的投诉。

transcript.en: Tom: I think you've benefited a lot from the internship.
transcript.cn: 我觉得你从这次实习中收获了很多。

transcript.en: Mona: Yeah, absolutely.
transcript.cn: 是啊，绝对是。

transcript.en: Mona: In the beginning, I just wanted to complete the essay for the course.
transcript.cn: 一开始，我只是想完成这门课的论文。

transcript.en: Mona: But in the end, I found it has given me some practical examples which are helpful to what I intend to do after graduation, as you know I've always wanted to do something related to hotel management.
transcript.cn: 但到最后，我发现它给了我一些很实用的例子，对我毕业后想做的事很有帮助，你也知道我一直想从事跟酒店管理相关的工作。

transcript.en: Mona: Due to the time limitation, I still haven't got a clear idea of some specific work positions.
transcript.cn: 不过由于时间有限，我对一些具体的工作岗位还没有清晰的概念。

transcript.en: Tom: Well, I heard you're going to give us a presentation of your essay next time in class?
transcript.cn: 对了，我听说你下次课上要给我们做一个论文的展示？

transcript.en: Mona: Yes, actually I'm not so good at giving a presentation.
transcript.cn: 是的，其实我不太擅长做展示。

transcript.en: Mona: But the tutor says that's just what he wants me to do, to know what is important when doing a presentation, like how to attract the audience, make eye contact and make gestures, etc., and other students can learn from my presentation.
transcript.cn: 但导师说这正是他想让我做的，好让我明白做展示时什么最重要，比如怎么吸引观众、怎么进行眼神交流、怎么做手势之类的，其他同学也能从我的展示中学到东西。

transcript.en: Tom: I'm looking forward to it.
transcript.cn: 我很期待。

transcript.en: Tom: You know, now I'm only in the second year of the course, and I have to write an essay next semester.
transcript.cn: 你知道的，我现在才上课程的第二年，下学期就要写论文了。

transcript.en: Tom: But I have no idea about where I can do an internship.
transcript.cn: 但我完全不知道该去哪儿实习。

transcript.en: Tom: There're several hotels which I'm interested in.
transcript.cn: 有好几家酒店我都挺感兴趣的。

transcript.en: Tom: Do you think I should call their managers?
transcript.cn: 你觉得我该给它们的经理打电话吗？

transcript.en: Mona: Well, I suggest you'd better not because you're more likely to be rejected by them.
transcript.cn: 嗯，我建议你最好别这么做，因为你很可能会被他们拒绝。

transcript.en: Mona: There is a career office on campus that has got a list of companies offering internship opportunities to students.
transcript.cn: 校园里有个就业办公室，那儿有一份为学生提供实习机会的公司名单。

transcript.en: Mona: The office will help you contact where you want to go.
transcript.cn: 办公室会帮你联系你想去的地方。

transcript.en: Mona: You just have to prepare your personal information like the CV.
transcript.cn: 你只需要准备好个人资料，比如简历。

transcript.en: Mona: Oh, don't forget to provide a reference from the tutor.
transcript.cn: 哦，别忘了让导师提供一封推荐信。

transcript.en: Tom: Great!
transcript.cn: 太好了！

transcript.en: Tom: I've got it.
transcript.cn: 我明白了。

transcript.en: Mona: So, have you got any plans for your essay?
transcript.cn: 那你的论文有什么计划了吗？

transcript.en: Tom: I've noticed that the hotel industry is developing at a high speed.
transcript.cn: 我注意到酒店行业正在高速发展。

transcript.en: Tom: People are more and more concerned about the quality of accommodation.
transcript.cn: 人们越来越关注住宿的品质。

transcript.en: Tom: What I'm struck by is the numerous statistics showing the ever-increasing number of five-star hotels, so I intend to carry out extensive research on this aspect.
transcript.cn: 让我印象深刻的是那些显示五星级酒店数量不断增加的大量统计数据，所以我打算就这方面做深入的研究。

transcript.en: Tom: I'm thinking about using video as a research method, but I haven't decided yet.
transcript.cn: 我在考虑用视频作为研究方法，不过还没最终决定。

transcript.en: Mona: I think it's an interesting topic.
transcript.cn: 我觉得这是个很有意思的题目。

transcript.en: Mona: Anyway, if you have any questions later, I will be happy to help.
transcript.cn: 总之，你之后要是有什么问题，我很乐意帮忙。

transcript.en: Tom: Thanks a lot, Mona.
transcript.cn: 太感谢了，莫娜。

transcript.en: Mona: You're welcome.
transcript.cn: 不客气。

groups.title: The Early History of Salt
groups.desc:
Questions 31-40
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.collect: Introduction • Salt is essential for human $31$. Ancient Rome • The word $32$ '' comes from the Latin word 'solarium argentum', which was used to describe the payment to Roman soldiers. Ancient Sweden • Animals were kept in the local $33$ at the right time of year. • Fresh meat was only available in $34$. • Salt has been used widely: we can tell from the diet of the $35$ in Sweden. • $36$ consumption increased rapidly because the food was much too salty. Salt sources • People mainly extract salt from oceans and $37$ in the basins. • Salt from spring water is more $38$ and purer compared to that from sea water. Salt distribution • in ancient Sweden – Locals needed to protect the $39$ by which they imported salt. • in other ancient countries – People carrying salt around were seen as a natural means of $40$.

questions.title: Salt is essential for human 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 essential、human；提示词 human，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题答案信息由强调信号词 More importantly 引出："… salt plays an indispensable role in the health of human beings." 其中 plays an indispensable role in 替换了题干中的 is essential for，另一个定位词 human 于答案之后紧跟着出现，比较容易听出。因此答案为 health。

questions.title: The word 【   】 '' comes from the Latin word 'solarium argentum', which was used to describe the payment to Roman soldiers.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Ancient Rome、Latin、Roman soldiers；此处词性无法确定。
题目解析：定位词 Ancient Rome 出现时距离答案信息较远，需耐心等待。随后便听到了其他定位词 soldier、Latin 先后出现在同一句中："A soldier's pay, which partly consisted of salt, was known as 'solarium argentum' in Latin, from which we derived the English word 'salary'." 其中 pay 替换了题干中的 payment，derived A from B 替换了 A comes from B。因此答案为 salary。

questions.title: Animals were kept in the local 【   】 at the right time of year.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Ancient Sweden、Animals；提示词 local，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题与上一题之间间隔较长，需耐心等待定位词的出现。在定位词 Ancient Sweden 原词重现后，本题所考查的内容依然没有立马出现，而是在对当时的情况进行了简单的介绍之后，才出现了定位词 Animals："… many families in Sweden began to raise animals in the surrounding forests during the summer …" 其中 raise 替换了题干中的 were kept，surrounding 替换了 local，during the summer 指的就是 at the right time of year。因此答案为 forests。

questions.title: Fresh meat was only available in 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Fresh meat；提示词 in，此处应填地点类或时间类名词。
题目解析：本题定位词 Fresh meat 出现于答案之后，属于答案前置。正确的做法是，在上一题结束后，根据预判直接抓取附近出现的时间类或地点类名词，然后再通过后面出现的定位词进行验证。在上一题之后，可听到："These animals were fed every day until about three to four months later, that's in October, they were ready to be butchered for meat, and that was the only month when ancient Swedish people had fresh meat on their table." 其中出现了时间类名词 October，后半句中也提到这是当时瑞典人唯一能吃到 fresh meat 的月份，only month 对应 only available。因此答案为 October。

questions.title: Salt has been used widely: we can tell from the diet of the 【   】 in Sweden.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 diet；提示词 the，此处应填名词。
题目解析：根据题干的语义，可判断空白处应该是一个表示人的名词。题干中没有很好的定位词，diet 容易发生替换，注意根据语义进行定位，重点听有关盐的广泛使用的描述。在上一题之后，先是听到了人们如何利用盐来储存剩下来的肉，接着便提到有证据来证明这种做法的广泛性。答案句为："Historical documents in 1573 recorded the Swedish king's everyday meals, mentioning that 175 pounds of meat was consumed each year, but over 150 pounds was salty." 其中 Swedish 替换了题干中的 in Sweden，everyday meals 替换了 diet，抓取附近符合预判的词汇即可。因此答案为 king。

questions.title: 【   】 consumption increased rapidly because the food was much too salty.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 consumption、food、salty；提示词 consumption，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 consumption 在录音中被表达为 sales，答案句为："… the documents also noted the annual sales of beer in Sweden soared during that period …" 其中 soared 替换了题干中的 increased rapidly。另外两个定位词 food 和 salty 于答案之后才出现，其中 salty 被替换为 high levels of salt。因此答案为 beer。

questions.title: People mainly extract salt from oceans and 【   】 in the basins.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 oceans、basins；提示词 oceans and、in the basins，此处应填地点类复数名词。
题目解析：本题定位词在录音中均原词重现，锁定答案句为："… among which the two most important ones are oceans and basins. On the floor of the latter often lie deserts where traces of salt can be found, …" 其中难点在于听懂 the latter 指的就是 basins，空白处要填的词汇应从属于 basins 的一部分，硬实力做题需要听懂意思，技巧性做题只需要抓取 basins 之后符合预判的地点类词汇即可。因此答案为 deserts。

questions.title: Salt from spring water is more 【   】 and purer compared to that from sea water.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 spring water、sea water；提示词 more、and，此处应填形容词。
题目解析：空白处所填词汇应与 purer 为并列关系。录音中先是听到了 sea water，接着 spring water 由转折信号词 However 引出，答案信息紧跟其后："We can hardly find any impurities, and the salt level is much more concentrated." 其中 hardly find any impurities 替换了题干中的 purer，抓取 and 之后出现的符合预判的形容词即可。因此答案为 concentrated。

questions.title: Locals needed to protect the 【   】 by which they imported salt.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 ancient Sweden；提示词 the，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 ancient Sweden 出现后，相隔一句无效信息才出现了答案相关信息："In order to make sure they could buy enough salt from abroad, the Swedish had to attach great importance to shipping and keep it undamaged, …" 其中 buy … from abroad 替换了题干中的 imported，keep … undamaged 替换了 protect，it 指的就是前面的 shipping。因此答案为 shipping。

questions.title: People carrying salt around were seen as a natural means of 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 other ancient countries、carrying … around；提示词 of，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 other ancient countries 出现后，先是对 People carrying salt around 这种行为进行了具体描述，在录音中被表达为 moved them to the surrounding regions，接着便出现了答案信息："And gradually these people were considered as a mode of transport in early times." 其中 gradually 替换了题干中的 natural，were considered as 替换了 were seen as，mode 替换了 means。因此答案为 transport。

transcript.en: In my presentation, I'm going to talk about salt.
transcript.cn: 在这次演讲中，我要讲的是盐。

transcript.en: In modern times, when we talk about salt, people may associate it with high blood pressure or increased heart risk, and many health experts warn that we should use less salt in our meals and dishes.
transcript.cn: 在现代，一提到盐，人们可能会把它跟高血压或心脏病风险升高联系起来，很多健康专家也警告我们做菜时应该少放盐。

transcript.en: However, we should not ignore its importance in our cuisine and even in early human history.
transcript.cn: 然而，我们不应该忽视它在烹饪乃至早期人类历史中的重要性。

transcript.en: Salt is one of the oldest, most ubiquitous food seasonings.
transcript.cn: 盐是最古老、最普遍的食物调味品之一。

transcript.en: The taste of salt is one of the basic human tastes.
transcript.cn: 咸味是人类的基本味觉之一。

transcript.en: More importantly, salt plays an indispensable role in the health of human beings.
transcript.cn: 更重要的是，盐对人类健康起着不可或缺的作用。

transcript.en: For example, it regulates the body's acid-base balance.
transcript.cn: 比如，它能调节人体的酸碱平衡。

transcript.en: Because of its importance to survival, salt has often been considered a valuable commodity during human history.
transcript.cn: 正因为盐对生存至关重要，在人类历史上它常常被视为一种珍贵的商品。

transcript.en: This can be tracked all the way back to Ancient Greece, Ancient Egypt and Ancient Rome when salt was highly valued and used as a method of trade and currency.
transcript.cn: 这可以一直追溯到古希腊、古埃及和古罗马时期，那时盐备受重视，被当作一种交易和货币的手段。

transcript.en: In Ancient Rome, the busiest road leading to the city was the 'Via Salaria', which means 'the salt route' in English.
transcript.cn: 在古罗马，通往城市最繁忙的那条路叫作'Via Salaria'，用英语说就是'食盐之路'。

transcript.en: A soldier's pay, which partly consisted of salt, was known as 'solarium argentum' in Latin, from which we derived the English word 'salary'.
transcript.cn: 士兵的军饷中有一部分是盐，在拉丁语里叫作'solarium argentum'，英语单词'salary'（薪水）就是由此演变而来的。

transcript.en: A soldier's salary was cut if he 'was not worth his salt', an expression still used today.
transcript.cn: 如果一个士兵'不称职'，他的军饷就会被削减，这个说法沿用至今。

transcript.en: In fact, salt was not only the first condiment discovered but also the first preservative.
transcript.cn: 事实上，盐不仅是人类发现的第一种调味品，也是第一种防腐剂。

transcript.en: We know today that food goes bad because microorganisms in the food multiply in abundance, and a high-salt environment is not conducive to microbial reproduction.
transcript.cn: 今天我们知道，食物变质是因为食物中的微生物大量繁殖，而高盐环境不利于微生物繁殖。

transcript.en: Extremely high concentrations of salt can even kill microorganisms in the food.
transcript.cn: 极高浓度的盐甚至能杀死食物中的微生物。

transcript.en: The ancients certainly didn't know this, but they did know that 'salted food can be preserved for a long time'.
transcript.cn: 古人当然不懂这个道理，但他们确实知道'腌过的食物可以保存很久'。

transcript.en: The use of salt as a preservative can be traced to ancient Sweden.
transcript.cn: 用盐作防腐剂的做法可以追溯到古代瑞典。

transcript.en: At first, hunting was the principal means of livelihood.
transcript.cn: 起初，狩猎是人们主要的谋生方式。

transcript.en: In this case, meat supplies were unlikely to be frequent.
transcript.cn: 在这种情况下，肉食供应不太可能稳定。

transcript.en: What's more, fewer animals were available for hunting.
transcript.cn: 而且，可供狩猎的动物也越来越少。

transcript.en: In order to ensure the supply of meat, many families in Sweden began to raise animals in the surrounding forests during the summer, when the weather was suitable for animals to survive.
transcript.cn: 为了保证肉食供应，瑞典很多家庭开始在夏天，也就是适合动物生存的时节，把动物养在周围的森林里。

transcript.en: These animals were fed every day until about three to four months later, that's in October, they were ready to be butchered for meat, and that was the only month when ancient Swedish people had fresh meat on their table.
transcript.cn: 这些动物每天都被喂养，直到大约三四个月后，也就是十月份，它们就可以宰杀取肉了，而那也是古代瑞典人餐桌上唯一能吃到鲜肉的月份。

transcript.en: Then with the continuous increase in productivity, people finally had some meat left.
transcript.cn: 后来随着生产力不断提高，人们终于有了吃剩的肉。

transcript.en: However, how to store the meat had become a headache, until someone invented a whole new way to preserve food: salting.
transcript.cn: 然而，如何储存这些肉成了一个难题，直到有人发明了一种全新的食物保存方法：腌盐。

transcript.en: People tried to keep meat from going bad by adding some salt to it, and it could be preserved for several months and even years.
transcript.cn: 人们试着往肉里加些盐来防止它变质，这样肉就能保存好几个月甚至好几年。

transcript.en: There was evidence that salt was widely used to preserve meat.
transcript.cn: 有证据表明，盐被广泛用于腌制肉类。

transcript.en: Historical documents in 1573 recorded the Swedish king's everyday meals, mentioning that 175 pounds of meat was consumed each year, but over 150 pounds was salty.
transcript.cn: 1573年的历史文献记载了瑞典国王的日常饮食，提到每年要消耗175磅肉，其中150多磅是腌过的。

transcript.en: From this we can clearly see the importance of salt in Sweden at that time.
transcript.cn: 由此我们可以清楚地看出盐在当时瑞典的重要性。

transcript.en: In addition, the documents also noted the annual sales of beer in Sweden soared during that period, and this must be related to high levels of salt in their food.
transcript.cn: 此外，文献还提到那段时期瑞典啤酒的年销量激增，这一定与他们食物中盐含量高有关。

transcript.en: Now, let's turn to the sources of salt.
transcript.cn: 现在，我们来说说盐的来源。

transcript.en: Where is salt from?
transcript.cn: 盐是从哪里来的呢？

transcript.en: Well, salt is common in nature.
transcript.cn: 其实，盐在自然界中很常见。

transcript.en: It has long been found that salt can be extracted from sea water, mineral deposits, saline lakes, brine spring, etc., among which the two most important ones are oceans and basins.
transcript.cn: 人们早就发现，盐可以从海水、矿床、盐湖、盐泉等地方提取，其中最重要的两种来源是海洋和盆地。

transcript.en: On the floor of the latter often lie deserts where traces of salt can be found, such as the Sahara.
transcript.cn: 后者的底部往往分布着沙漠，可以在那里找到盐的踪迹，比如撒哈拉沙漠。

transcript.en: Furthermore, the quality of different salt types varies a lot.
transcript.cn: 此外，不同种类盐的品质差别很大。

transcript.en: For example, salt from sea water is always mixed with impurities, so after the salt is dried, the sediments and other chemicals need to be purified before eating.
transcript.cn: 比如，海水里的盐总是混杂着杂质，所以盐晒干后，还需要把沉淀物和其他化学物质提纯之后才能食用。

transcript.en: However, this is not the case with salt from spring water.
transcript.cn: 然而，泉水里的盐就不是这样。

transcript.en: We can hardly find any impurities, and the salt level is much more concentrated.
transcript.cn: 我们几乎找不到任何杂质，而且盐的浓度要高得多。

transcript.en: Then how did people distribute salt around the world?
transcript.cn: 那么人们过去是怎么把盐分销到世界各地的呢？

transcript.en: Of course, in modern times we have various ways of transporting goods.
transcript.cn: 当然，在现代我们有各种各样运输货物的方式。

transcript.en: But in ancient times, it was not the case.
transcript.cn: 但在古代情况可不是这样。

transcript.en: Take ancient Sweden we mentioned before as an example.
transcript.cn: 就拿前面提到的古代瑞典来说吧。

transcript.en: Because of the heavy use of salt in the diet, Sweden could not feed itself and had to import large amounts of salt from other countries.
transcript.cn: 由于饮食中大量用盐，瑞典自己无法自给自足，只能从其他国家进口大量的盐。

transcript.en: In order to make sure they could buy enough salt from abroad, the Swedish had to attach great importance to shipping and keep it undamaged, as it was the most crucial way at that time.
transcript.cn: 为了确保能从国外买到足够的盐，瑞典人不得不非常重视海运并保证它不受损，因为那是当时最关键的方式。

transcript.en: While in other ancient countries, in order to distribute salt to other places, groups of men were employed.
transcript.cn: 而在其他古代国家，为了把盐分销到别处，人们雇了一批批的人。

transcript.en: They put bags of salt on their shoulders or backs and moved them to the surrounding regions.
transcript.cn: 他们把一袋袋盐扛在肩上或背上，运到周边地区。

transcript.en: And gradually these people were considered as a mode of transport in early times.
transcript.cn: 渐渐地，这些人就被看作是早期的一种运输方式。

transcript.en: Later, with the improvement of traffic conditions, salt trade between different regions was boosted, and long-distance food trade was also promoted, making communication between different cultures more frequent and ...
transcript.cn: 后来，随着交通条件的改善，不同地区之间的盐贸易得到了发展，长途食品贸易也得到了推动，让不同文化之间的交流更加频繁，而且……
